в—‡  Startup optimization в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв•®
в”‚                                                                        в”‚
в”‚  - NODE_COMPILE_CACHE is not set; repeated CLI runs can be slower on   в”‚
в”‚    small hosts (Pi/VM).                                                в”‚
в”‚  - OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN is not set to 1; set it to avoid extra startup  в”‚
в”‚    overhead from self-respawn.                                         в”‚
в”‚  - Suggested env for low-power hosts:                                  в”‚
в”‚    export NODE_COMPILE_CACHE=/var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache           в”‚
в”‚    mkdir -p /var/tmp/openclaw-compile-cache                            в”‚
в”‚    export OPENCLAW_NO_RESPAWN=1                                        в”‚
в”‚                                                                        в”‚
